title: Pilaf with Russian Twist
description: A flavorful pilaf dish, enhanced with the subtle flavors of Russian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the buttery sauce mix and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the diced cucumber and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh dill.
